tagline: ai prep search is now available in Beta.
what_it_does: ai prep search is now available in Beta. This SQL function transforms the structured output of ai parse document into search ready chunks optimized for vector search and RAG pipelines. Applies to: Databricks SQL Databricks Runtime Beta This feature is in Beta.
why_it_matters: Databricks might upgrade the supported or default version to reflect improved representations based on ongoing research.
plain_summary: ai prep search is now available in Beta. This SQL function transforms the structured output of ai parse document into search ready chunks optimized for vector search and RAG pipelines.
